findings.problem: Race between add and change events when awaitWriteFinish poll interval < write latency
findings.evidence: Integration test flaky on CI macOS runners; pollInterval default 100ms vs large file copies
findings.recommendation: Debounce change until size stable for pollInterval × stabilityThreshold

findings.problem: Watcher error events not forwarded when ignoreInitial and watching glob root
findings.evidence: Unit test gap; manual repro with unreadable subdir emits silent failure
findings.recommendation: Attach error listener before ready; bubble via _emit

findings.problem: fs.statSync in readdir loop blocks event loop on large trees
findings.evidence: Profiling: 1000-entry dir adds ~120ms sync block on main thread
findings.recommendation: Batch stat via async fs.promises.stat with concurrency limit

findings.problem: No regression test for EMFILE / too many watchers edge case
findings.evidence: Issue #1095 class of bugs; test suite has no ulimit simulation
findings.recommendation: Add mocked fs.watch failure path test

findings.problem: Duplicate platform flags scattered across handlers
findings.evidence: isMac/isWindows checked in 4 files with slightly different logic
findings.recommendation: Centralize platform detection in constants module

findings.problem: Dev dependency glob@7 still present though glob@10 used in scripts
findings.evidence: npm ls shows duplicate glob major versions
findings.recommendation: Align glob version or remove unused devDep
